tools.name: get_3d_status
tools.description: Check the status of a 3D model generation task

tools.name: create_3d_job_from_url
tools.description: Internal API for creating 3D jobs from pre-validated URLs. Use process_image_url_to_3d for user-provided URLs instead.

tools.name: get_3d_job_status
tools.description: Get the status of a 3D generation job by job ID

tools.name: get_3d_result
tools.description: Get the result of a completed 3D generation job

tools.name: process_image_url_to_3d
tools.description: Convert image URLs to 3D models when users provide URLs and request conversion. Primary tool for user-initiated URL-based 3D generation with progress display.

tools.name: image-to-3d
tools.description: Show the image to 3D widget interface for manual uploads
